tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'github_pull_requests'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    repo,
    COUNT(*) AS count_per_repo,
    MAX(additions) AS max_additions_in_repo,
    MAX(CASE WHEN additions = (SELECT MAX(additions) FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'open' AND additions > 400 AND closes_linear IS NULL) THEN number END) AS pr_with_most_additions
FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'open' 
    AND additions > 400 
    AND closes_linear IS N…(+50)

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    repo,
    number,
    additions
FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'open' 
    AND additions > 400 
    AND closes_linear IS NULL
ORDER BY additions DESC
LIMIT 1"}
